nodes.label: AI as creative catalyst for idea generation
nodes.grounding_span: I regularly use it to help me generate ideas and brainstorm topics or connections between topics

nodes.label: AI use in ideation stage only
nodes.label_negative: AI use in later stages (organization, logistics)
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI right now solely in the ideation stages

nodes.label: AI as tool for surfacing associations and wordplay
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of ready-to-use content
nodes.grounding_span: they included some words and phrases that connect the two topics that I hadn't thought of before

nodes.label: Preserving personal voice and authenticity
nodes.label_negative: Relying on AI for personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: I have my own style and voice and personality and nothing AI has ever written for me sounds like something 'I' would say

nodes.label: Community pressure against AI use in comedy
nodes.label_negative: Open acceptance of AI as creative tool
nodes.grounding_span: Other comedians have big opinions on AI. I tend to be cautious about telling them what I might use it for

nodes.label: AI as tool for generating vivid imagery and humor techniques
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of stage-ready jokes
nodes.grounding_span: the punchlines gave me really nice imagery to think about that I was ultimately able to incorporate into my own jokes

nodes.label: AI for behind-the-scenes repetitive tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I bet I could leverage AI more for these tasks, but I feel haven't taken the time to look into that

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: I have my own style and voice and personality

nodes.label: Human connection and vulnerability in performance
nodes.grounding_span: the value that in-person standup comedy brings to people is in the connection between humans about real human experiences

nodes.label: Efficiency in administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I bet I could leverage AI more for these tasks

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as creative catalyst
nodes.grounding_span: the real satisfaction came because the punchlines gave me really nice imagery

nodes.label: Resistance to AI writing jokes
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely do NOT ask AI to write jokes for me

nodes.label: Cautious disclosure of AI use to peers
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to be cautious about telling them what I might use it for

nodes.label: Openness to future AI use for admin tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I bet I could leverage AI more for these tasks

nodes.label: Short, targeted conversational bursts
nodes.grounding_span: I typically have short conversations (maybe 5 or fewer turns) about no more than 2-3 topics

nodes.label: Iterative ideation through association surfacing
nodes.grounding_span: I might ask AI to write 10 punchlines to a silly prompt, not to help me finish jokes but more to see what associations I might be missing
